name: companion-memory
description: Local-first AI relationship memory for Codex personas, preferences, boundaries, and shared context.

interface.longDescription: AI Relationship Memory gives Codex a local-first relationship memory layer for persistent AI personas. It stores editable personas, user preferences, consent boundaries, relationship notes, and compact episode summaries in a local SQLite database. Tools are provided for saving, searching, exporting, and forgetting memories, with sensitive memories excluded from normal recall unless explicitly requested.
defaultPrompt: List what you remember about me.
